channel.title: Reflected Xss on KevinSec
channel.description: Recent content in Reflected Xss on KevinSec

item.title: Reflected XSS Explained: Context, Root Cause, Impact
item.description: A beginner-friendly explanation of reflected cross-site scripting from context to root cause, impact, testing, and remediation.

item.title: Stored XSS vs Reflected XSS: Practical Differences
item.description: A practical comparison of stored XSS and reflected XSS, including root cause, exploitability, impact, detection, and remediation.
